- What parts of the world should our product cover, is it local for Türkiye? (h)
    - A map is the best tool when looking for a place. For interface. Map is MUST.
    - The whole map. A user should be able to consume stroires from other locations. Inclusiveness. Hisarğstğ data/stories are sufficient when populating the database.

- What user roles exist: viewer, contributor, student, moderator, archivist, admin? (h)
    - Guest ve rol. What should an unregistered user see in the app? Answer: Should be able to see stories/read-only.
    - Yalan hikaye, Güvenlik açığı, spamın önüne geçmek için lazım.
    - Incorect stories, security, spamming. Need registered users.
    - Should there be roles? Contributer ve documentarian. Description states elderly and youth connection. But not just not that.
    - If they have a story to tell why not?

- What information should be displayed on a user’s profile page and which information can be hidden (e.g., name, location details, past activity, reviews)? (h)
    - Kırşehir'de aile var ama İstanbul'dasın. Dede hikaye anlattı onu paylaşabilmeli. Girtmediği yer hakkında kötü bir şey paylaşmak!
    - User shpuld be able to post stories of an another place. Kırşehir İstanbul story.
    - Think of the well-meaning scenarios.
    
- Should there be a reward system to motivate users to contribute, if yes how? (h)
    - Can put a requirement for reward system. 

- What should users see first on the main page when they open the app (map, timeline, latest posts, featured stories)? (h)
    - Seeing a spesific location's stories, fast.

- In what ways should posts be displayed (list, cards, map, timeline)? (h)
    - Domain spesific -> not just a feed.

- Should there be a search option, if yes what should it be based on? (h)
- Should there be a user/post filtering feature, if yes what they should be filter by (time, location, topic, contributor, or media type)? (h)
    - Nelere göre olmalı cevabını veremem dedi. Neye ihtiyaç var. Absolute must filtreleme ve arama. 
    - Customer said that he cannot say for what type pf things the filtering should be on. 
    - Absolute must. Filtering and searching

- Who can create a post: anyone or only verified users? (h)
    - For possible misuse and exploitation, measures should be taken when seen. 
    - Don't restrict what you can post (in terms of location) but do need some kind of moderation.

- What media types are supported (video, voice recording, written text)? (h)
    - Good to have. Not absolute must. NO ONLY TEXT. Should be able to combine

- Should there be like/dislike/comment/save features? (h)
    - Yes

- What information should be provided when posting a story (year, location, characters etc.)? (h)
    - Must ahve fieldlar keisnlikle olmalı ama biz düşünecekmişiz. Bir hikaye okumak istediğinde biri, bunu gerçek lduğunu kavramak için ne bilmesi lazım
    - There should be must have fields. We should figure it out. When someone reads a story, what information do they need to know it is real.
    - Time resoluiton may vary. Can be really spesific or not. "In my childhood..."
    - Need the year, as a starting point.
    - 2010- 2020 . Feel free. 
    - 80's can be seen in the timeline of a location

- Should there be a notification system, if yes for what? (h)
    - In the future, might be enforced. But not a consideration now. 

- How to handle complaints, privacy issues, and explicit content in videos or pictures? (h)
    - An edge case. Especially the privacy issues. 

- Should all posts be verified? If yes, by who? Should there be a review system for posted content? (h)
    - Vague. Don't restrict but report. Hard to automate verification MODERATOR. 
    - Look at hpw Google Maps handles it

Extra:
- A page for a larger location, say Istanbul, can be implemented. Custmer wasn't a huge fan about this but a good addition.
